text.message: Solo block at 2 points eh? Nice
Alright GL red and oj, I’m robbing blue every time now
I’m going to make sure they don’t win
The same exact reason you soloed me originally and then stole from me when OJ was at 3 and I was sitting at 2 without a road even built
OJ wirh a city and 2 down devs and you rob me, you guys are so wild
